import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let total = string.len(text)
  mut i = 0
  mut line_no = 1
  mut start = 0
  while i < total
    let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 10
      let line = string.substring(text, start, i)
      println("#{line_no}: #{line}")
      line_no = line_no + 1
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < total
    let line = string.substring(text, start, total)
    println("#{line_no}: #{line}")
  end
end
